ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coflows" (
  "coflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coflow */,
  "arrival_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the coflow arrived at the data center */,
  "flow_num" INTEGER /* Number of flows within the coflow */,
  "departure_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the coflow departed from the data center */,
  "total_size" INTEGER /* Total size of the coflow in bytes */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the coflow (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flows" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow */,
  "coflow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coflow this flow belongs to */,
  "mapper_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the mapper handling the flow */,
  "reducer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the reducer handling the flow */,
  "packet_arrival" INTEGER /* Time at which the packet arrived */,
  "packet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet */,
  "packet_mean" INTEGER /* Mean size of packets for this flow */,
  "packet_variance" INTEGER /* Variance in packet sizes for this flow */,
  "src" TEXT /* Source MAC address for the flow */,
  "dst" TEXT /* Destination MAC address for the flow */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the flow (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate for the flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flows_coflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("coflow_id") REFERENCES coflows ("coflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flows_reducer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reducer_id") REFERENCES reducers ("reducer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flows_mapper_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapper_id") REFERENCES mappers ("mapper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mappers" (
  "mapper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapper */,
  "mapper_name" TEXT /* Name of the mapper */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mapper */,
  "mapper_type" TEXT /* Type of mapper (e.g., Java, Python) */,
  "mapper_version" TEXT /* Version of the mapper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reducers" (
  "reducer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reducer */,
  "reducer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reducer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the reducer */,
  "reducer_type" TEXT /* Type of reducer (e.g., Java, Python) */,
  "reducer_version" TEXT /* Version of the reducer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reducer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet metric */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flow this metric belongs to */,
  "packet_arrival" INTEGER /* Time at which the packet arrived */,
  "packet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet */,
  "packet_mean" INTEGER /* Mean size of packets for this flow */,
  "packet_variance" INTEGER /* Variance in packet sizes for this flow */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate for the flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_metrics_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flows ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network path */,
  "src" TEXT /* Source MAC address for the path */,
  "dst" TEXT /* Destination MAC address for the path */,
  "path_length" INTEGER /* Length of the network path */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the network path */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the network path */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter of the network path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "coflow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coflow this alert is related to */,
  "alert_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., congestion, failure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_coflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("coflow_id") REFERENCES coflows ("coflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "coflow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coflow this report is related to */,
  "report_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_reports_coflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("coflow_id") REFERENCES coflows ("coflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" INTEGER /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "created_time" INTEGER /* Time when the configuration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the network device */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the network device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the network device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the network device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the network device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device metric */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., %, MB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "log_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the log was generated */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the log */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_time" INTEGER /* Time when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow path */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flow this path belongs to */,
  "path_length" INTEGER /* Length of the flow path */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the flow path */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the flow path */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter of the flow path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_paths_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flows ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow metric */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flow this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., throughput, packet loss rate) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., MB/s, %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_metrics_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flows ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coflow_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coflow metric */,
  "coflow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coflow this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., average flow size, total flow count) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., MB, count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coflow_metrics_coflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("coflow_id") REFERENCES coflows ("coflow_id")
)
